response:
<<THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS>>

MODULE 1: IDENTIFY THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS  
THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS ARE [MU_X], [MU_Y], [SIGMA_X2], [SIGMA_Y2], AND [SIGMA_XY].  

MODULE 2: CALCULATE THE COVARIANCE BETWEEN X AND Y  
THE COVARIANCE BETWEEN X AND Y IS [SIGMA_XY].  

MODULE 3: GENERATE THE SEQUENCE OF PRIMES FOR EACH YEAR FROM 13 TO 19  
THE PRIME NUMBER AT AGE 14 IS [PRIME_14], AT AGE 15 IS [PRIME_15], AT AGE 16 IS [PRIME_16], AT AGE 17 IS [PRIME_17], AT AGE 18 IS [PRIME_18], AND AT AGE 19 IS [PRIME_19].  

MODULE 4: VALIDATE THAT EACH PRIME ADHERES TO THE RULE  
EACH PRIME IS GREATER THAN THE SUM OF THE SQUARES OF THE DIGITS OF THE PREVIOUS NUMBER.  

PLAYER
